note: Media pro start-list articles. The robot (scripts/ingest-pro-starts-media.mjs) PARSES each article's BIB·Name·Nation table → creates all listed pros + CONFIRMED starts; often earlier than PTO. triathlon.de 'profi-startliste-*' articles are AUTO-DISCOVERED via its blog sitemap (event/series from slug, race date from the article) — no manual upkeep there. This registry is for (a) pinning an article with clean event/date/series (wins over discovery) and (b) other sites. ADD = one entry: url + event + date (race date, ISO) + optional series/location/confidence (default confirmed). NOTE: the table parser is tuned to the triathlon.de format; other sites may need a parser tweak.
